name: apsal-studio
description: Create modular AI photography from natural language with interactive DNA cards, local Registry, reproducible prompts, and resumable image runs.

interface.shortDescription: 一句话设计世界，选择 DNA，生成九张独立摄影作品
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio turns one natural-language idea into interactive Character, World, Scene, and Photo DNA decisions, then saves deterministic prompts and runs nine independent image Jobs. Its official Registry, Semantic Contract 0.3, validators, and Skill packager work offline.
defaultPrompt: 创建一套九张东方极简窗边人像主题。
用自然语言帮我设计 Character、World、Scene 和 Photo DNA。
继续上次未完成的 APSAL 九镜头创作。
